summary: Phase 2 frontend testing complete. All 11 test scenarios passed after fixes. Two bugs found and fixed: (1) Next.js Server Actions failing due to x-forwarded-host/origin mismatch — fixed by adding allowedOrigins in next.config.ts. (2) Create SP/SC actions didn't return DB id, causing crypto.randomUUID() fallback in client state — edits on newly-created items failed with 'Cannot coerce the result to a single JSON object'. Fixed by adding id to .select() in both actions and using result.id in modal onSaved callbacks.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Next.js Server Actions blocked with 'Invalid Server Actions request' — x-forwarded-host (media-ops-desk.preview.emergentagent.com) did not match origin (media-ops-desk.cluster-5.preview.emergentcf.cloud)
bugs_found_and_fixed.severity: CRITICAL — all server actions (create/edit/delete) were returning 500

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: createSpecialProject and createSocialTask only returned sp_ref/sc_ref, not the DB-generated id. SPModal/SCModal used crypto.randomUUID() as fallback. Edit/Delete on newly created items (before page refresh) failed silently because the fake UUID didn't match any DB row.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added id to .select('id, sp_ref') and .select('id, sc_ref') in both action files. Updated SPModal and SCModal to use result.id ?? project?.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()
bugs_found_and_fixed.severity: HIGH — Edit newly created items broken in same session

test_results.1_sp_page_loads: PASS — stat boxes, filter buttons, empty-state table all visible
test_results.2_create_sp: PASS — SP-045 created, sp_ref format correct, appears in table
test_results.3_edit_sp: PASS (after fix) — edit of newly created project works correctly
test_results.4_delete_sp: PASS — row disappears after confirm delete
test_results.5_sc_page_loads: PASS — 5 stat boxes, filter bar, table visible
test_results.6_create_sc: PASS — SC-042 created with sc_ref, instagram+twitter platforms shown
test_results.7_submit_sc: PASS — status changes to submitted, toast 'SC-042 submitted for review'
test_results.8_delete_sc: PASS — row count decreases after delete
test_results.9_admin_social_tab: PASS — 5th tab 'Social Copy' visible and clickable in /admin/settings
test_results.10_admin_readonly: PASS — no create/edit/delete/submit buttons in admin Social Copy tab

critical_code_review_comments: activity_log entries in SP and SC actions use action:'user_invited' and action:'task_assigned' as enum values for non-auth events — these are semantically incorrect labels but may be the only available enum values. Main agent should verify this is intentional.
Server actions set updated_at manually but Supabase may also have a trigger for this — the explicit set works but could cause conflicts if triggers are added later.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully tested and passing. Two bugs were found and fixed. Server Actions now work correctly (allowedOrigins configured). Create+Edit in same session now works. All CRUD operations for Special Projects and Social Copy verified. Admin Social Copy tab is read-only as expected. TypeScript compiles clean.
rca_of_issues: 1) Next.js security check rejects Server Actions when x-forwarded-host != origin header — this happens in the Kubernetes ingress where the public URL differs from the internal cluster URL. Fix: allowedOrigins config. 2) SPModal/SCModal onSaved callback used crypto.randomUUID() as ID fallback for new items because the action only returned sp_ref/sc_ref. The DB-assigned UUID was never propagated to client state. Fix: return id from insert action and use it in onSaved.
